alternateCalendars.label: Early/Middle College and Academies Academic Calendar 2027-2028

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Guilford County Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Guilford County Schools is Monday, August 23, 2027. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year — one day earlier than the 2026–2027 start date of August 24.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Guilford County Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Guilford County Schools is Thursday, June 8, 2028. The school year runs from August through June, covering 185 instructional days — two days earlier than the 2026–2027 end date of June 10.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2027-2028 for Guilford County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Guilford County Schools runs April 10–14, 2028 — a full week off. This is nearly three weeks later than the March 22–26 window in 2026–2027. Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools shares the same April 10–14 break week, a rare alignment between the two districts.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2027-2028 for Guilford County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Guilford County Schools runs December 20–31, 2027, a total of 12 days. School resumes Monday, January 2, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2027-2028 for Guilford County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Guilford County Schools runs November 24–26, 2027 (Wednesday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 25. School resumes Monday, December 1, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Shifts Later
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break moves from Mar 22–26 (2026–2027) to Apr 10–14 — a shift of nearly three weeks later. Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools breaks the same April 10–14 week, an unusually close alignment between the two districts.

yearNumbers.label: 12-Day Winter Break
yearNumbers.detail: Winter Break runs December 20–31, 2027 — 12 days off. School resumes Monday, January 2, 2028, without an additional teacher workday buffer as in 2026–2027.

yearNumbers.label: 185 Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: Guilford County requires 185 instructional days — 5 more than the North Carolina state minimum of 180, adding a full extra week of school compared to minimum-compliance districts.

calendarNotes: Guilford County Schools begins the 2027–2028 school year on August 23, 2027. Spring Break runs April 10–14, 2028 — the same week as Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools, an unusually close alignment between the two districts. The school year ends June 8, 2028.
